action_set_definitions.name: get_short_pick_log
action_set_definitions.description: Accesses the digital WMS Short-Pick Log to retrieve the specific item IDs and quantities that are missing for a given order.

order_id.description: The unique ID of the order to check (e.g., 'EDI-772-BOS').

action_set_definitions.name: query_inventory_location
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the inventory system to find the current bin location and available quantity for a specific item SKU.

action_set_definitions.name: navigate_to
action_set_definitions.description: Commands the agent/robot to move to a specific coordinate or named station within the warehouse map.

target_location.description: The destination bin code or station name (e.g., 'A-202', 'Wrapping_Station', 'Scale_W&D').

action_set_definitions.name: pick_item
action_set_definitions.description: Instructs the agent to pick a specific quantity of an item from its current location into its carrying unit.

quantity.description: The number of units to retrieve.

action_set_definitions.name: consolidate_pallet
action_set_definitions.description: Triggers the palletization process, applying specific stacking and safety standards.

order_id.description: The ID of the order being consolidated.

ti_hi_standard.description: If true, apply Tier-High safety stacking standards.

protect_fragile.description: If true, ensures fragile items are positioned and protected correctly.

action_set_definitions.name: weigh_and_dim_pallet
action_set_definitions.description: Uses the Weigh & Dim station to measure the final weight and physical dimensions of the pallet.

order_id.description: The order ID associated with the pallet.

action_set_definitions.name: get_outbound_lane
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the specific outbound lane identifier for the carrier assigned to the order.

order_id.description: The unique identifier of the order.

action_set_definitions.name: stage_pallet
action_set_definitions.description: Drops the consolidated pallet at the specified outbound lane for carrier pickup.

state_description.inventory: A mapping of item IDs to their current quantity and specific bin location (e.g., {'SKU_001': {'qty': 50, 'loc': 'A-101'}}).
state_description.active_orders: A list of orders currently assigned for fulfillment, including item IDs and target quantities.
state_description.robot_status: Details of the robot agent including 'current_location', 'battery_level', and 'carried_items'.
state_description.warehouse_map: Connectivity graph or coordinate map of the warehouse zones/aisles.

nodes.Aisle-A-10: Storage zone for heavy industrial parts.

logs.Short-Pick_Incident_Log: Incident ID: 4492. Order: EDI-772-BOS. Missing Item: 10 units of SKU-FGL-202. Status: Replenished to High-Value-Cage-04.

nodes.High-Value-Cage-04: Secure storage for electronics and fragile sensors.
nodes.Lane-7: Outbound staging lane for Old Dominion Freight Lines.
